parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gda_idiq_tracker (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  contract_number TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  idiq_name TEXT NOT NULL,
  agency TEXT,
  issuing_office TEXT,
  naics_codes TEXT[],
  contract_ceiling NUMERIC DEFAULT 0,
  period_of_performance_start DATE,
  period_of_performance_end DATE,
  gda_position TEXT DEFAULT 'targeting' CHECK (gda_position IN ('holder','teaming','targeting','monitoring')),
  gda_prime_or_sub TEXT DEFAULT 'prime' CHECK (gda_prime_or_sub IN ('prime','sub','either')),
  vehicle_type TEXT DEFAULT 'IDIQ' CHECK (vehicle_type IN ('IDIQ','BPA','GWAC','MAC','SA-IDIQ')),
  set_aside TEXT,
  total_tos_issued INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  total_to_value NUMERIC DEFAULT 0,
  last_to_date DATE,
  on_ramp_status TEXT DEFAULT 'none' CHECK (on_ramp_status IN ('none','open','closed','upcoming')),
  on_ramp_deadline DATE,
  competitors TEXT[],
  incumbent_primes TEXT[],
  sam_search_keywords TEXT[],
  notes TEXT,
  source_url TEXT,
  last_checked TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);
SELECT i.*, 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker o WHERE o.ai_analysis ILIKE '%' || i.contract_number || '%' OR o.opp_title ILIKE '%' || i.idiq_name || '%') as tracked_tos
FROM gda_idiq_tracker i ORDER BY 
  CASE i.gda_position WHEN 'holder' THEN 1 WHEN 'teaming' THEN 2 WHEN 'targeting' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END,
  i.contract_ceiling DESC

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', action: 'list', idiqs: $input.all().map(function(i) { return i.json; }), count: $input.all().length, summary: { holders: $input.all().filter(function(i) { return i.json.gda_position === 'holder'; }).length, targeting: $input.all().filter(function(i) { return i.json.gda_position === 'targeting'; }).length, monitoring: $input.all().filter(function(i) { return i.json.gda_position === 'monitoring'; }).length, total_ceiling: $input.all().reduce(function(s, i) { return s + (parseFloat(i.json.contract_ceiling) || 0); }, 0) } }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO gda_idiq_tracker (contract_number, idiq_name, agency, issuing_office, naics_codes, contract_ceiling, period_of_performance_start, period_of_performance_end, gda_position, gda_prime_or_sub, vehicle_type, set_aside, competitors, incumbent_primes, sam_search_keywords, notes, source_url) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5::json::text[], $6, $7::date, $8::date, $9, $10, $11, $12, $13::json::text[], $14::json::text[], $15::json::text[], $16, $17) ON CONFLICT (contract_number) DO NOTHING RETURNING *

UPDATE gda_idiq_tracker SET total_tos_issued = COALESCE($1::int, total_tos_issued), total_to_value = COALESCE($2::numeric, total_to_value), last_to_date = COALESCE($3::date, last_to_date), on_ramp_status = COALESCE(NULLIF($4, ''), on_ramp_status), on_ramp_deadline = COALESCE($5::date, on_ramp_deadline), notes = COALESCE(NULLIF($6, ''), notes), last_checked = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $7 OR contract_number = $8 RETURNING *

SELECT i.*, (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(o)) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker o WHERE o.ai_analysis ILIKE '%' || i.contract_number || '%' OR o.opp_title ILIKE '%' || i.idiq_name || '%') as related_task_orders FROM gda_idiq_tracker i WHERE i.id = {{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.idiq_id || 0 }} OR i.contract_number = '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.contract_number || '' }}' LIMIT 1

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid action. Use: list, add, update, detail' }) }}
